llm_judge.rationale: Two highly relevant results found. Results 4 and 5 (PORTARIA 806 and PORTARIA 2101, both from Ministry of Health in 2002) perfectly match the benchmark - they are Ministry of Health portarias that qualify municipalities for the Bolsa-Alimentação program, containing exact matches for 'qualifica municípios', 'BOLSA-ALIMENTAÇÃO' in title, and within the 2002 date range. The expected minimum of 1 result is exceeded.
